topics.title: The Amanda Batula / Kyle Cooke Divorce & West Wilson Relationship — Summer House's 'Perfect Couple' Implodes
topics.hook: Bravo / Summer House — hottest current reality TV drama
topics.why_trending: Amanda Batula and West Wilson confirmed their romance on April 1, 2026. Amanda separated from Kyle Cooke (her husband and castmate, long considered Bravo's 'perfect couple') in January. West is Ciara Miller's ex. The love triangle fallout has dominated Bravo coverage all month — reunion filming, Ciara speaking out about the 24-hour notice she got, and Kyle essentially disappearing from public discourse. This is a perfect LLMA story: the 'curated TV couple' performance collapsed the moment the cameras stopped incentivizing it.
topics.angle: When you spend 8 seasons performing a marriage for the cameras, what happens when the performance is no longer profitable? Amanda and Kyle were Bravo's answer to 'the perfect couple.' Their relationship was content. Now that it's over, we're watching people try to figure out who they are without the storyline. That's what LLMA is built to prevent: designing your partnership FIRST instead of discovering it was always a performance.

topics.title: Gen Z Lavender Marriages Are Going Mainstream — For Financial Reasons, Not Political Ones
topics.hook: Gen Z / TikTok trending — economic + relationship trend fusion
topics.why_trending: TikTok is full of Gen Z content about 'marrying your best friend' for practical reasons — shared rent, tax benefits, co-parenting without romance. The lavender marriage concept has shed its exclusively LGBTQ+ framing and become a Gen Z life-design hack. This plays directly into LLMA's core mission.
topics.angle: Gen Z didn't discover lavender marriages — they pragmatized them. When you can't afford a house, a romantic 'soulmate' starts to feel like a luxury. A reliable partner who's actually got you? That's the real flex. LLMA is ahead of this curve.

topics.title: Secret Lives of Mormon Wives Season 5 Is Filming — Taylor Frankie Paul Charges Dropped
topics.why_trending: The Salt Lake City DA declined to file domestic abuse charges against Taylor Frankie Paul as of April 16, 2026, clearing the path for Season 5 to resume filming. The show is the premier pop culture vehicle for 'what happens behind a performative traditional marriage' — and it just got more runway.
topics.angle: Secondary hook — can be woven into content when we need a Mormon Wives reference. Best used as supporting context rather than a main topic this drop.

note: Main topic is the Amanda Batula / Kyle Cooke / West Wilson / Ciara Miller Summer House implosion — the hottest Bravo story of April 2026. Secondary supporting reference to Mormon Wives Season 5 news where relevant. Gen Z lavender marriage trend woven throughout as the 'why this matters' layer.
